emails.subject: FW: Slides #17 & #28
emails.body: FW: Slides #17 #28 Kevin, what do you want to do about slide 17? To: Ratner, Michael

emails.subject: RE: Slides #17 & #28
emails.body: RE: Slides #17 #28 Why can't we use 2001 numbers? Is this due to "publicly available information"? This package is being used for financing purposes and thus is excluded from any such limitation. Kevin

emails.subject: RE: Slides #17 & #28
emails.body: The 2001 numbers are available only in the FERC form 2s and they are not out yet.
